race.comment: ELITE GATHERING (8) has been less effective in her last two but opened the campaign in good order. Started favourite over debutant Pierroplane last start who has since run well in town. Easier company now and this looks her best chance yet to break the ice. OR AM I (11) finds it tough to get off the mark but has produced runs this campaign that could see her get off the mark this time. Gets in light with the 2kg claimer engaged but she has the job ahead from out there. SIR AALI (2) progressed nicely here second-up when sticking on gamely into the placings. Strips fitter but has had plenty of cracks. CAESOUR'S TOMB (5) hasn't looked likely in his two runs back despite the market support. The rise in trip looks the right move. THE GRUMP (7) was going better earlier in the prep and is in the mix if he can recapture that form.
